fullText: Well, I can vouch for this. I forgot I had made this pic public in the past.

quotedStatus.fullText:
Michael Burry @michaeljburry read a Wall Street book from the 1870s.

Every time institutions or people acted like they do today, he marked the page with a red sticky.

The book is basically a porcupine.

Human nature doesn't change.
Greed doesn't change.
Fear doesn't change. https://t.co/qJsfx0X4Ir
